entries.purpose: Evidence hub; preserve each document's date and current or retired category
entries.title: AARC Clinical Practice Guidelines

entries.purpose: Model only; never substitute for current state law or board rules
entries.title: AARC Model Practice Act

entries.purpose: Optional licensed evidence context; never assign staff or prove adequacy
entries.title: AARC Safe and Effective Staffing Guide

entries.purpose: Official credential-status source separated from licensure and local scope
entries.title: NBRC Credentialed Practitioners and Credential Maintenance

entries.purpose: Education-program context; never infer individual competency or product accreditation
entries.title: CoARC Accreditation and Program Resources

entries.purpose: Institutional privacy design; local privacy and legal owners interpret applicability
entries.title: HHS HIPAA Minimum Necessary

entries.purpose: Real de-identification requires an approved method; self-redaction is not accepted in Private mode
entries.title: HHS De-identification Guidance

entries.purpose: Institutional cloud authorization, risk analysis and agreement context
entries.title: HHS HIPAA Cloud Computing

entries.purpose: Human teamwork and communication reference; AI never closes the loop
entries.title: AHRQ TeamSTEPPS 3.0

entries.purpose: AI governance reference with watched version and revision status
entries.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework

entries.purpose: Regulatory reference; determination remains a qualified-human function
entries.title: FDA Clinical Decision Support Software Guidance

entries.purpose: Medical-device cybersecurity reference; target has no device connection
entries.title: FDA Medical-Device Cybersecurity Guidance

notice: Recommendations do not prove current applicability, local adoption, clinical validity, institutional approval, credentials, authority or permission to act.
